Due to that, when Li Yun obtained the boundary stele's approval, all the magnified life-forms became completely obedient to him. In reality, it was equivalent to gaining the control of the entire island.

From all that, one question arose immediately: How were the divine planes which had degraded to ordinary dimensional spaces different from Li Yunmu's heavenly world?

The answer was simple. The former was inherited from others while the latter was nurtured by oneself.

The difference between them was also that Li Yun had only obtained the resources left behind by the ancient god while Li Yunmu was capable of utilizing the world power of the entire heavenly world. Within it, he was a god.

Li Yunmu took a long time to absorb the information sent by Li Yun while also inputting it within the system's database for further analysis and deductions.

"You, are you still Elder Brother Yunmu?"

At some point of time, Wang Yan had walked to Li Yunmu's side and spoke to him with a haggard face.

Li Yunmu turned to look at her and replied only after a long time. "Perhaps for others I may no longer be the previous Li Yunmu, but for you, I will always be Elder Brother Yunmu."

"Really, no, even if you are lying, everything was worth it for this one line." A hint of a smile broke out on Wang Yan's haggard face. Soon after, she fell into Li Yunmu's embrace.

"Elder Brother Yunmu, if one day you find no choice but to fight against people of my world, Yan'er requests you that you should leave behind a bloodline of the people from my world," Wang Yan said and gradually closed her eyes.

[Host, she has swallowed a large amount of poison. She will die quickly,] the system warned Li Yunmu in his mind.

"What happened here? Did you poison her?"

Li Yunmu was suddenly enraged, but he discovered that the signs of her life were quickly depleting. Every hint of her vitality was fading away.

Such a situation was even more grave compared to that of the Widowed Nakht of Hall Clan.

Without any hesitation, Li Yunmu quickly took out the sacred life water and poured three drops into Wang Yan's mouth.

No reaction!

It was too late. Wang Yan had not left any opportunity for Li Yunmu to rescue her.

But the next instant, the outstanding life-saving technique Major Reversal began its work, and a green light enveloped Wang Yan's body.

Sacred life water together with Major Reversal were unbelievably potent. No one had expected that Li Yunmu would have such terrifying trump cards. Perhaps even Wang Yan herself hadn't expected that she, who was so certain of her death, would surprisingly be brought back to life.

Gradually, Wang Yan's cheeks gained some color. Li Yunmu had forcibly brought back a dead person to life!

When Zheng Quan and Luo Honghua saw it, a fear concealed in the depths of their eyes could be seen.

This Li Yunmu isn't only formidable, with strength surpassing other descenders, but also possesses outstanding life-saving techniques!

There truly wasn't any comparison between them. Li Yunmu was probably the greatest threat for any descender.

After a long while of trying to rescue Wang Yan, her vitality finally returned.

"System, her vitality has been restored, so why isn't she waking up?" Li Yunmu asked in a cold voice which would give chills to anyone who heard it.

[Although the large dose of poison had been cleared, she had swallowed a rare type of poison which attacks the nerves. Her brain has been damaged…] the system replied after a short silence.

"I only want to know how I can wake her up," Li Yunmu said, interrupting the system.

As a matter of fact, his emotions toward Wang Yan weren't that deep. Since the beginning, he hadn't thought of her in that way, but he knew that he owed her too much.

Honestly speaking, it could even be said that he had used Wang Yan's feelings toward him to learn the secret of ghost silk pollen. This was the true reason behind his guilty conscience.

However, although he knew it, if given another chance, he would take the same course of action. Because from the beginning, descenders from the others planes were his mortal enemies. Li Yunmu couldn't possibly miss this opportunity and allow Zheng Quan and his group to obtain the control of the island; it would decrease his own chances of survival .

After some pondering, the system gave a blunt reply. [According to the data gathered, the system doesn't have a response to host's question. Presently, everything depends on her will to live.]

Li Yunmu sighed deeply. His gaze suddenly fell on Zheng Quan and Luo Honghua.

"It isn't related to us, she herself took the poison out of shame," Zheng Quan hastily tried to clear his name.

"Yes, it really isn't related to you, but since Wang Yan is unable to live, then there's no need for you two to remain alive," Li Yunmu said in a soft voice.

But those words were like a death sentence to Luo Honghua and Zheng Quan.

"You cannot do this. Just now, you promised to let us live in front of everyone, saying that we can spend the rest of our lives on this island."

At that instant, Luo Honghua was finally afraid and began to panic.

Before this, she hadn't expected that the 'native' whom she disdained from the beginning would be able to take control of her life.

"I said it, but now… I changed my mind," Li Yunmu replied, which made Luo Honghua realize what sort of character she was facing.

It wasn't someone who clung to the old ideas of honor and pride, who could be deceived easily by her charm.

"No, let me live. I am ready to do anything for you, anything. As long as you let me live, I am willing to do anything, including using my body to entertain you."

Luo Honghua's legs went soft. She promptly knelt and started begging for forgiveness from Li Yunmu.

When facing death, this formidable woman who looked at all men in disdain finally revealed her most primitive instincts.

"Alright, then you go to hell first and wait for me there. You must wait for me nicely, ok?" Li Yunmu replied with delight while nodding.

The next instant, a red tongue wrapped around Luo Honghua who was screaming miserably. Before anyone could do anything, its owner swallowed her whole.

The sound of gulping caused everyone to tremble. After seeing that Li Yunmu remained unmoved in front of Luo Honghua's cries for mercy, everyone dispelled the nefarious intentions in their hearts. Compared to normal death, being devoured by a toad was far more terrifying.

chapters.title: Chapter 413: Frozen
chapters.body:
Chapter 413: Frozen

Chapter 413: Frozen

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

The sight of Luo Honghua disappearing into the toad's stomach terrified everyone. Zheng Quan kept sweating continuously, but he forced himself to calmly ask, "What could I do to guarantee my life?"

"You are an intelligent person, much smarter than Luo Honghua, so you should understand," Li Yunmu replied to him.

After a long while of hesitation, Zheng Quan asked in a decisive tone, "What secret do you want in exchange of my life, so that I can still continue to live on?"

"There's no guarantee. You can only put your trust in me."

"Alright, I will inform you about the passage to return to my plane… Go die!"

Suddenly, Zheng Quan rebelled and rushed to attack him.

Clearly, the word compromise didn't exist in his dictionary. There was no way that an arrogant person like Zheng Quan would accept his loss graciously. Because of that, there was no way he would make any other choice than to make a last attempt to regain his freedom.

Zheng Quan knew that even if Li Yunmu abided by his promise and allowed him to live on the island until he died, what sort of life would that be?

His only option was to attack Li Yunmu. If he succeeded, the unknown shadow life-form would also dissipate or perhaps die. As long as that happened, the island and its inheritance would return to being without any owner. Only then would Zheng Quan have any chance to make something of himself.

Even if such a chance was miniscule, he had to try. With that thought in mind, Zheng Quan used his final trump card and risked his life with it.

However, Li Yunmu wouldn't be defenseless. Zheng Quan understood that the opponent would be vigilant against him, since no one would be so stupid to trust an enemy so soon, but he still had to fight for his chance to survive and follow his ambition. Although his trump cards were very formidable, this was all he could do.

"Li Yunmu, accept your death. You forced me to do this."

Zheng Quan howled loudly, but his figure began to run away from the location.

At that instant, he didn't throw himself at Li Yunmu, but instead began to flee from the location at his top speed, which caused everyone around him to look around in confusion.

Wasn't he going to fight for his life? Then why was he running away crazily?

Only Li Yunmu understood what Zheng Quan was doing at that moment.

"Nuclear power? The legendary forbidden grade energy which was used by humans before the Dark Ages?"

Li Yunmu had been prepared for Zheng Quan's tricks since the start. But when he saw the descender throw out a micro bomb, he was filled with curiosity toward the most powerful energy under human control before Dark Ages.

He knew that this sort of energy had disappeared from the annals of history long ago. Even now the alliance of the six continents prohibited the research into this field because of its destructive power. There was no need in the new age for such energy which was only created for destruction.

The micro nuclear warhead which Zheng Quan had gotten from somewhere might have been really small, but it had the power to destroy the area of a whole mile around itself.

If Li Yunmu didn't have an approximate guess of Zhen Quan's trump cards, then maybe he would've been finished at that instant. Even if he had survived because of his defense and speed, he would've been gravely injured.

But when Zheng Quan triggered the micro bomb, Li Yunmu had already began to act.

He didn't make any large movements, just waved his hand, and the bomb which hadn't yet detonated was sucked into his two sun heavenly world. The next instant, the micro nuclear bomb was frozen by the world power inside.

"External assistance. In the end, everything was external assistance." Li Yunmu gave his evaluation in a calm and collected tone.

Zheng Quan's final weapon was also based on external factors.

But if truth be told, Li Yunmu himself wasn't much different. Azure Dragon Deity Battlesuit, forbidden weapon runic spears, snow guzzle thunder blade, underworld raven sage bow, and so on were all tools which provided external assistance.

Strictly speaking, even the system and shadows were external assistance. It was because of it that Li Yunmu hadn't said those words only for Zheng Quan, but also to make himself aware of it.

Li Yunmu wanted to make sure that he didn't forget this fact and remained alert about not staying dependent on external factors for the rest of his life.

"You, what sort of trick did you use to make the bomb disappear?"

When Zheng Quan had run several hundred meters away from the bomb, but didn't hear it explode, he turned around to see what had happened. At that moment, he suddenly discovered that his trump card had been neutralized.

"What you should understand is that I don't possess the trump cards you do, and you don't possess the trump cards I do."

Li Yunmu laughed. Indeed, Zheng Quan didn't possess his own heavenly world.

Even if he was a very outstanding youngster in his world, things like heavenly worlds didn't grown on trees. Even if his family had one, it wouldn't be a surplus which they could share with Zheng Quan who would be considered too young to possess one.

Because of that, Zheng Quan didn't have a heavenly world.

The reason why Li yunmu possessed one was because he had fought to obtain it for himself. And because his luck had favored him.

"My loss wasn't random. Seems like you are really a terrific character of your world who possesses an extraordinary background."

Zheng Quan didn't flee. His body was surrounded by a shining golden energy cover.

Li Yunmu was certain that it was a very advanced product of dimensional technology which ordinary people couldn't obtain.

That cover would have allowed Zheng Quan to survive the impact of the micro nuclear bomb. From that, it was obvious that the defensive capabilities of that golden cover were extremely great.

It may even be able to surpass Li Yunmu's absolute defense. But the difference between that defensive cover and Li Yunmu's body armor was that Li Yunmu's defense would remain with him all the time while Zheng Quan's could only be used until its energy ran out.

"You are wrong. I am only an ordinary person. But I had my lucky encounters. Alright now, let me witness your final struggle."

After successfully collecting the nuclear bomb, Li Yunmu didn't care about talking nonsense with the opponent and meaningfully looked toward Li Yun.

The next instant, the magnified insect monsters gathered in the vicinity rushed toward Zheng Quan like an ocean tide.

At this time, Li Yunmu experienced that even if Zheng Quan had countless trump cards, under the attack of the magnified insects, all of them were worthless!

Although Zheng Quan kept struggling bitterly, the insect monsters kept rushing toward him unceasingly.

By using all the tricks and trump cards up his sleeve, he managed to survive for an hour. But once he exhausted his bag of tricks, he vanished in an instant, without even his bones remaining behind.

chapters.title: Chapter 414: The Final Victor
chapters.body:
Chapter 414: The Final Victor

Chapter 414: The Final Victor

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

When Zheng Quan had revealed all of his strength without holding anything back, He Miao, Wang Ru, and the others who had been restless from the start were completely stunned.

It showed up that among those who kept their presence low and didn't stood out wasn't only Li Yunmu, but also Zheng Quan. At least, given Zhang Yuan's strength, it would've been impossible for him to preserve for a whole hour against all the insect monsters.

Descenders from Earth? What sort of existence are they?

At that moment, all the survivors were completely astonished. But the more they knew, the more restless they became.

In the end, Wang Ru summoned her courage and asked, "Yunmu, how do you plan to deal with us?"

"I haven't decided yet. You should know that since you have learned the secret of this island, then regardless of who stood in my place, they wouldn't let you reveal the secret to the world," Li Yunmu said after a moment of being quiet.

If he could choose, he naturally wouldn't involve Wang Ru, He Miao as well as the honest Lu Zhong in his schemes, but the matter at hand was just too important. He couldn't show the slightest mercy.

"I understand. In the end, you are also the same as Zheng Quan and Zhang Yuan and want to kill us?" He Miao said with an extremely bitter expression. Hearing it, the faces of others turned deathly white in an instant.

But they didn't show any resistance. Regardless of whether it was Zhang Yuan or Luo Honghua or even Zheng Quan who struggled until the end, their instincts told them that this matter was already settled. Any resistance would be nothing more than a waste of energy.

"Silencing you is obviously the best course of action, but I won't do that. You can all reside on this island."

Li Yunmu's words relieved everyone. However, when they remembered that they couldn't return to the Origin World, not even step out of the island, their excitement dampened.

But they were still very fortunate. If in the battle between Zheng Quan, Zhang Yuan, and Li Yunmu, the final victor would have been anyone else except Li Yunmu, they most likely wouldn't have had any chance to keep their lives.

"You, you, you, and you. Choose a piece of land in the neighborhood and construct a wooden house there."

Compared to how politely Li Yunmu treated Wang Ru, He Miao, and Lu Zhong, he wasn't the least similar to the other four people who had betrayed the alliance and entered Zhang Yuan's faction at that time.

Li Yunmu didn't feel any goodwill toward such turncoats and naturally wasn't polite when asking the four of them to do something. He simply gave them a command.

The four of them were flux experts, so if they really were in a hurry, they had enough energy and strength to create a small wooden castle in a few days.

"Hey, I still have something to request from you." Suddenly, Lu Zhong who had been silent until then spoke up. "I hope that you can take good care of my family in the outside world."

"Alright, don't worry about that. At least from the financial side, I can assure you that they would face any problems," Li Yunmu replied after some thought.

"Then I can rest easy here." After receiving Li Yunmu's promise, Lu Zhong looked at him with appreciation.

The ways of the world were always strange. He was being grateful to a guy who had trapped him. Naturally, he understood that if it had been Zheng Quan or Zhang Yuan who'd taken control of the place, then not only would his family not be taken care of, there would have been no guarantee that they wouldn't be silenced just to make sure that no one asked questions. With that being the alternative, Lu Zhong felt quite fortunate, and being an honest person, he felt truly grateful toward Li Yunmu.

"Then let's do this. I won't put any restrictions on your movement, but I hope that you won't approach the center of the island with any nefarious thoughts."

After making arrangements for the three of them, Li Yunmu had no time to pay attention to the seven people and returned to the boundary stele. He sat down cross-legged near it and closed his eyes to rest.

Lately, he had used up too much energy. The first thing he did, however, was to dispatch the eight dimensional space eyes.

Now that Li Yun controlled the island, the magnified insect monsters would definitely not attack them. Thus, his first action was to use the dimensional space eyes so the system could gain a thorough understanding of the island's geography. The system then quickly got busy with the task.

After that, Li Yunmu finally settled down and began to investigate Danger Critical Extinguisher which he had comprehended previously. He knew it was something special, but the moment he opened its description, he was stunned.

The newly comprehended extinguisher wasn't just one move, but rather a set of seven. Of them, except for the first one, the others were hidden behind a black line with a question mark on top of it. They were completely unknown. In other words, Li Yunmu had only comprehended the first move of the seven.

After pondering it for a while, Li Yunmu finally asked, "System, what was the approximate level of the extinguisher's strength when I used it?"

[According to the total strength of the extinguisher as well as the strength displayed by you, if all of that strength was concentrated into one strike, then it could kill an initial level great flux master. The transformation of the Danger Critical Strike was caused mainly by flume thunder energy,] the system quickly replied.

When Li Yunmu heard it, his heart skipped a beat. Although he had prepared himself mentally, the system's evaluation still left him astonished by the strength of extinguisher's first move.

Initial step great flux expert… As long as he used extinguisher, he could kill such a person in one strike!

What did this imply?

The flux experts of the Origin World were far more formidable than Earth's fluxers. Even initial stage great flux masters were roughly comparable to Earth's Nirvana stage experts.

Before Li Yunmu had descended, Lin Yuerou had informed him that she had just risen to Nirvana realm from Temporal realm. He had believed that he would need a very long time before he could reach her level, but if he used Danger Critical Extinguisher, he could kill an expert on her level, which was only second to sages on Earth, without much trouble.

Nirvana level experts on Earth were considered to formidable. Because of that, Li Yunmu had never expected that he could reach it in such a short time after coming to the Origin World.

Middle stage great flux experts approached sage layer in strength. High stage great flux masters could beat new sages easily, and those in the great circle of great flux master realm were equivalent to his Earth's quasi deities.

With a quick calculation, Li Yunmu understood the strength of Danger Critical Extinguisher. But unfortunately, there were harsh requirements to use the skill.

Not only could it be triggered only under the most dire of circumstances, it also consumed all of his strength. Even if Li Yunmu could use a pinnacle technique like Major Reversal, he still wouldn't risk using that skill under normal circumstances.

Soon afterwards, Li Yunmu's gaze fell upon the newly comprehended shadow skill by Li Yun- Shadow Carapace.

After carefully investigating it, he became aware that the only reason why Li Yun had been able to dodge the tongues was because of the enlightenment he had gained from Image Substitution Evasion. From it, he had created his own skill, Shadow Carapace.

Simply speaking, Shadow Carapace was quite similar to Image Substitution Evasion. It was modeled exactly after that skill.

Because of that, the Li Yun which had disappeared in the stomach of the golden toad hadn't actually beenLi Yun, but the shadow carapace, his substitute.

But this shadow skill didn't have the evasion part of Image Substitution Evasion. Due to that, his newly comprehended technique could only allow him to cheat death; there was no follow up technique to allow him to escape using the opportunity.

chapters.title: Chapter 415: Direction For The Sixth Level
chapters.body:
Chapter 415: Direction For The Sixth Level

Chapter 415: Direction for the Sixth Level

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Regardless, Li Yun had successfully comprehended the first shadow skill, which finally completed the necessary condition for the system to upgrade to the sixth level.

It had to be known that because of this unknown condition, the system's upgrade had been delayed for a very long time.

After upgrading to the fourth level, the system had gained the ability to exploit the space elements and create cultivation relaying globe. As long as Li Yunmu had a completed source manuscript, the system could create cultivation relaying globes without end, limited only by the number of space elements.

Although such an ability didn't sound that great, it provided a good enough foundation for Li Yunmu to establish a sect and nurture three hundred ape gods. In the future, it would become one of the main reasons behind why the ape gods could become a formidable back-up.

The ability gained by the system upon reaching the fifth level was script hacking.

In simple terms, this ability removed the restriction of hacking zone from the shadows. They no longer needed to remain at a certain distance from the host.

The best example of this basic ability was the current situation of Li Yunmu being an incredible distance away from Blue Moon Island, but his shadows still hacking like usual. They were still following the systematically planned out hacking orders without any problems. In other words, after the system was upgraded to the fifth level, Li Yunmu no longer needed to pay attention the hacking areas.

Even if he didn't to do anything, he would continue obtaining experience and ability points.

From all that, an obvious question arose: Once the system was upgraded to the sixth level, what new ability would it gain?

Li Yunmu was looking forward to it with expectations.

He wanted to know about it since a long time ago, but because of the seriousness of the situation, he didn't have enough time. But once the situation finally stabilized and everything was under his control, he naturally wanted to see what sort of formidable ability the system would gain after reaching the sixth level.

[At that point, the system will reach selective evolution which will proceed according to host's choices. Thus, the new ability will depend on the host,] the system replied to Li Yunmu's queries.

"What does this mean, what choices do I have?" Li Yunmu's eyes began to shine.

Before he could think much, an information window appeared in his consciousness ses, and the system gave two choices to Li Yunmu. Those choices were about the direction which would determine its evolution in the future.

The first choice was Noninterference System. With this choice, the system would continue to evolve according to the established direction and choose its evolution by itself.

The second choice was Interference System. With this choice, the system would evolve by considering the circumstances faced by the host.

When Li Yunmu looked at the two choices, he was somewhat conflicted.

It wasn't that he couldn't understand the them, but that they had different pros and cons. In simple terms, the first choice allowed the system to upgrade by a prearranged plan, but the new abilities it would gain may not be useful to Li Yunmu in his circumstances. In the long term, however, they would definitely become useful. After all, the system had certainly meticulously analyzed its direction for evolution and wouldn't act without rationale.

As for the second choice, it would allow Li Yunmu to choose the new ability which would be beneficially to them right away. Naturally, this would be extremely great to deal with whatever he faced at any particular time.

"System, what choice are you inclined towards?"

After thinking for a long while, Li Yunmu gradually made his decision. But before voicing it, he still wanted to hear the system's thoughts.

[The system is sorry, but it doesn't have the authority to determine its direction for evolution. Everything depends on the host's wishes,] the system replied without thinking much on it.

"Oh, is this to avoid influencing me?"

Once Li Yunmu heard it, his thoughts became complex. He hadn't expected that the system would be capable of thinking in such a human manner.

[Yes, that could be considered to be true,] the system replied.

"That's alright, I won't put you in an awkward position. I will choose the second option. I want the new abilities to be practically useful," Li Yunmu replied with complete certainty of his choice. It was clear that after pondering over the problem, he had prepared his answer with certainty.

[A choice that lacks foresight, but is indeed very practical!] the system said, giving its evaluation of Li Yunmu's choice.

"Ohh, what do you mean? Are you praising or mocking me?"

Li Yunmu remained unmoved, though. He was someone with his own definite views. Since he had already made his decision, he wouldn't regret it.

Perhaps he did indeed lack foresight! However, Li Yunmu understood long term strategies were all bull. All of it was unknown, just a lie.

Although, the word 'blueprint of future' sounded beautiful, it was describing just fleeting clouds!

Why, you ask? Because if you are unable to control the present, everything will be in vain. All the beautiful words will be just a moon seen in the water.

Only by controlling the present could one fight for actual benefits. Although the benefits he would obtain would be small, but considering the situation, his advantages would be something real.

[Both praising and mocking,] the system replied honestly.

Li Yunmu couldn't help but ask the system out of curiosity, "Then according to your reasoning, what choice should we have made?"

[According to reason, it seems appropriate for the system to choose the first option but…]

The system didn't finish its words.

"What else? You aren't finished yet, right?"

[Yes. Most of the previous hosts had chosen the first option and were usually defeated in the future,] the system replied after a moment of silence.

Li Yunmu almost coughed out a mouthful of blood. He understood, almost thoroughly understood it.

System? Intelligence? Ability to calculate and predict? Even if the system was an unprecedentedly intelligent product, it still wasn't perfect and had flaws. Perhaps it was very formidable, but it still failed sometimes.

Li Yunmu rejoiced that he hadn't changed his mind and stuck with his own choice.

"Then you should get busy with finishing the last matter and start updating yourself."

Li Yunmu finally laid out his plans.

The system had scanned the geography of the island with the help of the eight dimensional eyes. Terrain, weather, the distribution of living organisms as well as their strength to the smallest detail were all stored in its database.

Only after completely understanding the island could Li Yunmu move onto the next step of exploiting it.

That task had kept the system busy, and the first shadow Li Yun had also joined in. After all, being the one who had the highest authority in the island, he needed to offer his assistance to the system in every way possible.

chapters.title: Chapter 416: Long-Term Recuperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 416: Long-Term Recuperation

Chapter 416: Long-Term Recuperation

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

The busy period lasted for full three days. In other words, the system had to postpone its upgrade for three days.

After delegating the most important tasks, Li Yunmu began a tour of the island. He roamed around it for three days, and in the end, he was completely satisfied by the resources he saw.

The island perhaps couldn't be counted among the highest level dimensional spaces of the Origin World, but it definitely wouldn't be low on the ranking. Besides, the power he had inherited was also extremely promising. The magnified insect monsters were the core strength of the island, but Li Yun still needed time to control it.

Nothing could be accomplished in one step. Everything required a period of time to be accomplished, even if it was inherited.

After three days, the four turncoat members finally finished a small wooden castle at the center of the island under Li Yunmu's command. It wasn't very large, only occupying three thousand square meters and having two floors.

But it was sufficient to act as Li Yunmu's temporary shelter. Especially since it was constructed like a holiday resort.

After some thinking, Li Yunmu decided to invite Lu Zhong, He Miao, and Wang Ru to reside in the castle as well.

As for the four turncoats, he didn't care much what they did. In fact, they should be grateful that he wasn't treating them like slaves!

Li Yunmu didn't bother himself with them and just allowed them to stay at the outskirts of the forest to drag out their ignoble existence. Compared to the four of them, Lu Zhong and the two women got far better treatment.

After a few days, the three of them gradually accepted their new reality. After all, they weren't fools and understood that it was impossible for Li Yunmu to let them out because of the secret of the island. It was his bottomline.

Even if Li Yunmu didn't want to lock them up, he had no other choice.

Thus, after three days, they accepted his invitation, and Lu Zhong took the initiative to become housekeeper of the castle. All the livelihood requirements were arranged by him.

He Mian and Wang Ru voluntarily took the jobs of cooking the food and cleaning the castle.

On the fourth day, they heard a piece of information which gave them a hint of hope. Li Yunmu declared in front of them that when his strength had reached the level when he didn't need to worry about the consequences of people outside finding out about the island, he would allow the three of them to return to the Origin World.

Thus, Li Yunmu urged them to not neglect their cultivation. He also prepared some extreme grade power grain to help them with that.

If the freedom in the Origin World wasn't enough to convince them, then this treatment was able to turn what they saw as tragedy into a fortunate encounter. Naturally, given that the three of them hadn't cultivated superior body refining methods, it didn't take much effort from Li Yunmu to make preparations for their cultivation.

After all, the amount of power grain which they could consume every day wasn't much, let alone the number of extreme grade power grain.

On the fifth day, the system had finally completed its survey of the island. It then immediately began to upgrade under Li Yunmu's request.

The time required for that was very long! It far surpassed the time taken by the system during the fifth upgrade. Surprisingly, it was three whole months!

Li Yunmu had to accept that the system's previous words were correct. The fifth level system could only be considered to be in the lower mid grade. But when it entered the sixth level, it would truly become high level.

Above the fifth level, the conditions to upgrade the system were extremely difficult to fulfill.

If not for Li Yun who had followed Li Yunmu from the start and had been carefully nurtured by him, probably none of the other shadow would've been able to develop intelligence so quickly and comprehend their very first shadow skill.

Since Li Yun had done so, it meant that the other shadows could duplicate it for themselves as well.

"Three months is just perfect. I also need to enter seclusion for recuperation and consolidation after the quick increase in my strength in the recent times."

Li Yunmu chose that period of time to enter seclusion in the castle.

.....

Time continued to pass with the dreary life at the island.

Although Li Yunmu had spoken of recuperation and consolidation, the increase in his physical strength wasn't slow during this time, given that he possessed a sufficient amount of extreme grade power grain.

His strength continued to increase gradually reaching toward the peak. When he checked his strength after a month, he discovered that it had reached a new peak. If his physical strength had been thirty-five oxen before, then now it reached forty. It had broken through to another level.

Although it had only increased by five, Li Yunmu was still astonished by such an increase. It had to be known that the peak physical strength of flux expert level was fifty oxen. The closer one got to it, the more difficult would it become to increase.

The reason behind Li Yunmu's strength breaking through forty oxen wasn't simple. It was mostly due to the large number of extreme grade power grain which he had consumed everyday as well as the soaking in the medicinal bath made according to Meridian Nurturing Flux Point Technique. With those two things, his increase in strength was monstrous.

Lu Zhong, He Mian, and Wang Ru's improvements also didn't fall behind. In fact, they improved even more quickly than Li Yunmu.

After all, their individual strength had been at low level. On top of that, what caught everyone off guard was that the amount of flux energy drifting in the island exceeded the amount of flux energy moving through the Origin World.

Thus, regardless of whether it was their physical strength or flux energy, all of it had increased quickly during the month. In Lu Zhong's case, it was still all right, but in the case of He Miao and Wang Ru who were extremely weak before, the increase was the most prominent.

However, Li Yunmu's cheerful mood started going down when there was no news.

On the fifth day of the next month, there was still no sign from the pathfinder wasp. However, Li Yunmu had already determined that the underground cave for which Zheng Quan and other descenders had entered the island was precisely the cave in which he had taken refuge from the attack of giant ants.

This was because during the system's survey of the island before it started upgrading itself, many underground caves had been discovered, but there was only one which appeared extremely bizarre and mysterious.

But Li Yunmu wasn't too anxious about it. Instead, he continued to wait patiently until the system upgraded to the sixth level before exploring the cave again.

Perhaps that place concealed a way to return to every parallel plane from the Origin World.

chapters.title: Chapter 417: Earth'S Chaotic Situation
chapters.body:
Chapter 417: Earth'S Chaotic Situation

Chapter 417: Earth's Chaotic Situation

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

It had already been two years and six months since Li Yunmu and the others had descended.

After full thirty months, the Black Dragon Island gradually began to fade away from everyone's minds.

With time, everything would be forgotten, or at least dulled.

Even the rumors which were previously flying around about Earth's hope for heavenly transformation being on the island lots its interest when no news about it came, and with time, the ordinary people began to forget about Black Dragon Island's experience.

It was until one day...

A loud bang shook the whole world.

Black malicious energy charged out from the Black Dragon Island like lava from an erupted volcano, and rushed into the horizon. This scenario was like the birth of a powerful monster. In a split second, everyone on the six continents was affected. Yes, it was everyone.

Even the consciousness sea of ordinary people who hadn't cultivated flux energy was occupied by the malicious black energy. Darkness enveloped their vision as well as other senses.

It was like light had vanished from the whole world, for everything had turned pitch-black. This was the result of a person's soul being completely blocked out by the malicious energy.

Close to three hundred million people, countless different beasts, and any lifeform which had intelligence had simultaneously closed their eyes at that moment, as if worshipping something, and concentrated their attention on Black Dragon Island.

"That direction is…"

In the main palace of War God Temple, Battle God fiercely opened his eyes, waking up from meditation. His eyes, which were extremely ruthless as if thunder was flying through them, turned toward Black Dragon Island.

But it was useless. Even if he was publicly proclaimed as the most powerful person on Earth, his vision, his five senses, and even his spirit were full of boundless darkness.

"Black Dragon Island?"

"It's the Black Dragon Island?"

On the six continents of Earth, one by one, quasi deities, battle sages, barbarian kings, ocean emperors, and all the sages, looked toward Black Dragon Island with uncertainty.

At that instant, all the humans of Earth rose in an uproar.

Before long, Battle Sage Vega's image appeared in front of Battle God in War God Temple and spoke in an extremely serious yet slightly forceful tone. "Stop the war. I feel that an unprecedentedly malicious creature has arrived at our great homeland."

After pondering for a moment, Battle God finally declared his position. "Alright. After the dark curtain retreats, I will personally arrange peace."

Everyone realized that an event which could cause the formidable Battle God to take a step back couldn't be resisted.

Moreover, after two and a half years had passed, the heavenly transformation was coming closer and closer. There was no other choice than declaring armistice, since Earth didn't have much time left. They had to settle all internal strife before the heavenly transformation.

In fact, after Li Yunmu's generation had descended to the Origin World, many major events had happened on Earth in the two years and a half.

Among them, two matter were the most important. First was that Flux Ancestor had left this world! It had sent the six continents into chaos.

Flux Ancestor perishing was something which the people of the six continents couldn't have ever imagined. So at first, people thought it was impossible. In the eyes of everyone on Earth, Flux Ancestor was an entity closest to god. But during the major descending two and a half years ago, he had perished.

Until that day, those who weren't privy to all the facts didn't know what his death truly signified. But the people and influential clans in the highest echelons were clear that his death meant that they couldn't send anymore descenders to the Origin World ever again.

In other words, they had lost all hope of following up with their infiltration. Their only hope was the final generation of descenders.

The second matter was internal strife between the six continents of Earth. Ordinary people couldn't understand why all the powerful people in the world had ruthlessly attacked the Sacred Continent's Divine Religion just after returning from the Black Dragon Island.

Similarly, those who didn't know the true situation could never comprehend why had Northern Heavens come to support Divine Religion to withstand the attack of War God Temple, Ocean Temple, and Barbarian Shrine.

All three of them condemned Divine Religion as the worst criminal in the history of humanity with countless rapacious designs. However, Divine Religion didn't fall back and condemned War God Temple, Ocean Temple, and Barbarian Shrine for betraying humanity before heavenly transformation.

In short, all the transcending powers were in conflict with each other, pushing the Earth into another chaotic period like the Dark Ages. People even came to call the last two years and a half as Second Dark Ages.

Every day, the powerful transcendent, temporal, and nirvana flux masters would die in the war between the two major factions. At an interval of every few days, a powerhouse which had recently entered sage layer would perish in the meaningless internal strife.

The only transcending power which hadn't participated was Bladewood, which was situated on the Higher Dimensional Continent. After returning from Black Dragon Island, it closed itself. It severed all connections to the outside world and also prohibited its disciples from going out.

Even now when the two factions formed by the transcending powers had entered a heaven-shaking earth-shattering war, Bladewood remained like a mute and deaf person, staying within its own world.

"Damned Fluxer Association. At that time, Flux Ancestor shouldn't have passed on the responsibility of Fluxer Association to Mo Yue."

Thud.

The four barbarian kings were gathered together on the Desolate Continent, and Barbarian King Coiling Dragon smashed his hand heavily on the marble table.

When their Barbarian Shrine had allied together with War God Temple and Ocean Temple to suppress Divine Religion, the matter seemed to be very easy. Given that it was three against one, they could use the excuse of punishing the criminal of humanity.

Regardless of whether it was favorable terrain, weather, or number of people, they possessed absolute superiority. But when the three transcending powers had declared war against Divine Religion, they realized that they had been gravely mistaken!

Before the war was publicly declared, Divine Religion had kept waiting patiently and concealed itself deeply, which made everyone underestimate it. That's why when Frontline Heavens suddenly entered its faction, the enemies felt that the situation had suddenly become extremely complicated.

But the situation hadn't yet been too grave, the factor which had truly shaken the war between the two factions was the behemoth Fluxer Association after it had lost Flux Ancestor.

chapters.title: Chapter 418: Ling Shuang Returns
chapters.body:
Chapter 418: Ling Shuang Returns

Chapter 418: Ling Shuang Returns

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Mo Yue, who had been given the responsibility to take care of Fluxer Association by Flux Ancestor, surprisingly chose to stand on the side of Divine Religion and Frontline Heavens. In an instant, it balanced the power of the two sides.

Divine Religion, which had been the underdog at first, instantly saw their fortunes change.

These events led the chaotic situation on Earth!

Both factions blamed each other for selling all of humanity on their Earth. People's lives and future prospects had sunk into unprecedented abyss, to the point that no one could be trusted. If Earth's situation was to be described in one word, it would be 'collapsed'.

With the six transcending powers losing all public credibility, the continents also became hostile to each other and entered the whirlpool of war.

If a power with absolute dominance didn't intervene, the internal strife would continue until one of the two factions was completely annihilated.

But finally the situation changed for the better, after more than two years of chaos. However, this better turn wasn't because of good news from the transcending powers as the people of Earth had hoped. Instead, all the people of Earth, including those of transcending powers and influential clans, had been overtaken by a terrifying malicious energy.

"The enemy has called for a peace conference. I guess we all know the reason."

Battle God, Battle Sage Vega, Barbarian Kings, and Ocean Emperors reached a decision at lightning speed. They sent a message to a secret meeting point with Divine Religion where supreme pontiff, Frontline God of Frontline Heavens, and Mo Yue had also gathered.

"I hadn't expected that the uncompromising Battle God would surprisingly concede because of this matter."

Frontline God sighed, but Battle God's decision made them feel extreme pressure from the malicious energy rising from the Black Dragon Island.

"What are they saying?" asked a woman with an enchanting body over which she had draped a black gown that covered her entirely. Only her hands and lower leg could be seen, where her snow white skin was revealed.

She was the type of woman who didn't need to show her skin, for just by seeing her voluptuous body most of men would be intoxicated. But only Frontline God and Supreme Pontiff knew that Mo Yue wasn't an ordinary female.

"Let bygones be bygones. Ally with us to face the heavenly transformation as well as this malicious energy," Supreme Pontiff read the message aloud.

"I feel like we don't have any choice other than negotiating a peace," Frontline God agreed without raising any conditions.

"What about you, Madam Mo Yue?"

Supreme Pontiff narrowed his eyes toward the enchanting Mo Yue.

"Ask them to publicly acknowledge my status and existence," she suddenly said.

"I will talk to them about that. Time is of the essence, so I doubt they will make any excuses. Then let's stop war and go talk peace," Frontline God said to her.

After that, something happened which neither of the three hundred million people on Earth had expected. The internal strife between the six transcending powers which no one could've stopped was suddenly over because of the sudden eruption of the malicious energy from Black Dragon Island.

Of course, the only reason it happened was because when the energy erupted, the quasi deities felt incomparably heavy pressure.

.....

According to legends, in ancient times before Dark Ages, Kunlun Mountain 1 was a sacred mountain within the western part of the Central Continent. It possessed the Palace of Heaven which humans couldn't even imagine, and a deity level existence resided there.

But all of that was just a folktale or perhaps a rumor, maybe even a simple myth.

Kunlun Mountains of Central Continent just possessed a large amount of evolved beasts. It was the only region where humanity approved of their existence, because there were nine sage beasts residing on the mountain range.

The nine beasts were all comparable to Chaotian Bird. If their blood was refined to produce a drop of sage blood, it could create a sect or a sage bloodline.

Each of the sage beasts was comparable to two or three battle sages or quasi deities because they possessed innately formidable bloodlines.

Thus, Battle God representing Central Continent, had signed a secret non-interference treaty with the sage beasts. The nine beasts agreed that the evolved beasts of Kunlun Mountain wouldn't step outside the mountain range to create problems for humans and humans wouldn't enter the Kunlun Mountains.

It could be said that this was a secret of highest level which almost no one knew about, including even the outstanding people from the younger generations like Hai Yue and Man Tian, let alone Li Yunmu.

On that evening, the mountains which weren't open to humans had a visitor. No, it would more accurate to say two visitors. They walked from far away toward the Kunlun Mountains at an unhurried pace.

"Nine senior sacred beasts, you all are already old and your sage blood has been silent for a long time. It's time you returned nature..." a strong and robust silhouette mumbled near the entrance of Kunlun Mountains.

From his tone, it seemed like he didn't put the nine sage beasts in his eyes. After they used their power, the entrance to the Kunlun Mountains couldn't be seen or found.

Ordinary fluxers who didn't have any special secret techniques would never be able to walk into the true Kunlun Mountains. Even if they tried to search for them, they wouldn't find the entrance, let alone manage to intrude.

But at that moment, the concealed entrance to the Kunlun Mountains seemed to be wide open in front of the newcomer. If Li Yunmu had been there at that instant, his mouth would have dropped to the ground from astonishment.

The two people, the master walking in front and the servant walking at the back, were surprisingly his former followers, Barbarian Niu and his close friend Ling Shuang. Unexpectedly, they hadn't died in the dragon mist of Black Dragon Island.

Instead, after two years, they had again appeared in the world. But their appearances were quite bizarre.

And Ling Shuang was a servant?!

How could this woman, with her proud and arrogant nature, become Barbarian Niu's servant?

chapters.title: Chapter 419: Followers
chapters.body:
Chapter 419: Followers

Chapter 419: Followers

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Li Yunmu, who was cultivating on the island in the Origin World, naturally had no clue about the chaotic situation on Earth in the last two years, let alone that his former acquaintances Barbarian Niu and Ling Shuang who should've perished in the depths of dragon mist had returned to the Central Continent.

But their actions were extremely bizarre.

How had Barbarian Niu become the source of the terrifying malicious energy which scared all the powerhouses in the world? And how could Ling Shuang, a woman with strong will and a proud nature, accept to become his servant?

Every little thing was about them was extremely strange.

Li Yunmu didn't know anything about it, but if he did, he would certainly understand they now held a lot of secrets.

All the powerhouses in the world were searching for the source of the sinister energy, but no one could find it.

When Barbarian Niu returned to the Central Continent, he went to Kunlun Mountains where he shook the whole place sheltered by the nine sage beasts as if he was the local god of that area. But no one outside the region noticed it. Even the quasi deities and battle sages with the sharpest senses had no idea, as if some sort of barrier had arisen to obstruct their senses from sensing the changes.

...

After Li Yunmu had led Barbarian Niu, Demon, and Li Qinghong to descend to the Origin World, Blade Overlord who had returned from Black Dragon Island brought Underworld Hand, Devil Monkey, Nangong Gongzi, and Flowing Cloud to reside in the depths of Moro Mountain Tenebrous Hidden Domain.

The four formidable halted fluxers together with Flowing Cloud occupied the terrifying region after the peak flux disciples had descended to the Origin World.

Other fifth dimensional fluxers didn't know what was their aim behind isolating themselves in the Moro Mountain Tenebrous Hidden Domain. But those who had a great information network had guessed long ago that Blade Overlord and the other four were protecting the secret realm discovered by Li Yunmu before.

The depths of Moro Mountain Tenebrous Hidden Domain was a region which very few rainbow crystal fluxer dared to visit.

And because of Blade Overlord and the other four who had occupied it and were killing everyone who intruded, the hidden domain gradually faded out of public memory.

Although many people had had designs upon the secret realm discovered by Li Yunmu, they dispelled such thoughts because of the two reasons.

Blade Overlord and other four were extremely low-key during the time and had remained in the abyss of the hidden domain without ever coming out.

But that day, while the five of them were calmly cultivating in secret, all of them froze. Astonishment appeared on their faces.

"It's Barbarian Niu, I'm not mistaken. This presence definitely belongs to Barbarian Niu," Underworld Hand suddenly said while looking toward Kunlun Mountains.

After returning from Black Dragon Island, Blade Overlord had brought the unfortunate news about Barbarian Niu. All of them thus believed that he had died in the depths of dragon mist.

But on that day, his unfamiliar yet familiar presence startled all five of them.

"Yes, I can barely believe that it was really Barbarian Niu's presence. How is that possible? He actually returned from the dragon mist abyss?" Nangong Gongzi said with extreme astonishment.

Regardless of whether it was Barbarian Niu or them, all of them were Li Yunmu's followers whose soul imprints were bound to his heavenly world. Because of that, a formless connection existed between them.

When Barbarian Niu had come out from Black Dragon Island and went to Central Continent's Kunlun Mountains, they had immediately sensed that apart from the five of them, a sixth follower had showed up on Earth.

"It should be Barbarian Niu. According to what I know, apart from us, Master didn't have any more followers. If it is not him, then who else could it be?"

Flowing Cloud still adorned a cyan gown. When it was coupled with her beauty, she was like a fairy. But her presence was even more concealed and formidable than before.

"However, if Barbarian Niu returned, why hasn't he come to the hidden domain first and met with us?" Devil Monkey asked suspiciously.

"I feel we should go out now. First to investigate what's going on and second to use the opportunity to rescue master's family?" Nangong Gongzi suggested.

"No, without my order, no one can take even half a step out of the hidden domain. Everything will proceed as our master has planned." Blade Overlord immediately vetoed his suggestion.

"But the situation on Earth isn't very safe. War God Temple and Battle Sage Vega are going to enter a fierce battle with Divine Religion faction at any time. I'm afraid that master's parents aren't too safe in Vega City," Flowing Cloud couldn't help but say.

When Li Yunmu left the world, even he hadn't expected that a huge war would break out between the six transcending powers, affecting not only the six continents but also every single battle sage and quasi-deity. Even the supreme defender of Central Continent, Battle Sage Vega was involved.

If Li Yunmu had expected this, he might not have left his family's security in her hands.

But who could've expected such a thing? According to the circumstances at the time, it was supposed to be five transcending powers jointly attacking Divine Religion. But in the end, Northern Continent's Frontline Heavens rebelled, after which the behemoth Fluxer Association also went to stand by the side of Divine Religion, It then resulted in a deadlock between the two factions.

Throughout it all, Li Yunmu's followers had been holed up within the Fifth Dimension with their strength increasing greatly.

"Flowing Cloud's concerns are reasonable. Although master commanded us to not come out before ten years had passed, he definitely would have told us to spare no effort to get his family to the hidden domain if he knew that such a chaos would descend on the world. Blade Overlord, you are very inflexible," Underworld Hand said as his brows wrinkled.

"That won't do. We definitely cannot go out. After master left us, he gave me the responsibility to take care of all of you. I will deal with this matter carefully; otherwise, if you show in the world too early, you may wreck master's plans."

Blade Overlord had firmly held onto his stance to keep them from interfering, but he had loosened a bit, because the matter concerned the safety of Li Yunmu's family.

Regardless of whether it was Barbarian Niu or the war going outside, all of them were changing the situation. But if they left the Fifth Dimension and showed up outside, it would definitely affect Li Yunmu's plans.

While the five of them were unable to come to a unanimous decision, suddenly a sound of faint footsteps came from outside.

Their expressions changed instantly, but then returned to normal. Soon, a person dressed in black clothes to keep hidden rushed toward them. "Reporting, there's urgent news."

chapters.title: Chapter 420: Soul Imprint
chapters.body:
Chapter 420: Soul Imprint

Chapter 420: Soul Imprint

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

"Speak. If it was some ordinary matter, you wouldn't have taken the risk of entering the hidden domain. Quickly, tell us what you know." Blade Overlord's eyes narrowed as he waved his hand at the man.

"Reporting to domain masters. Yesterday, Battle God personally took the initiative to lead War God Temple, Barbarian Shrine, and Ocean Temple to Divine Religion's faction territory and launched peace talks. In less than a day, they agreed to peace without any conditions," the informer quickly reported the news.

"What? Battle God initiated for peace? Don't tell me War God Shrine and Central Continent lost the battle?"

The five of fluxers were shocked and began to look at each other in astonishment.

Battle God's fierce and intense style was deeply etched into their hearts. Earth's most formidable, strongest, decisive, and uncompromising person was the image of Battle God in the hearts of people. This also didn't mean just fluxers like Blade Overlord and the others, but every single person in the Central Continent.

Yet Battle God had taken the initiative to ask for peace. If that didn't mean that he had lost, then what else could it be? What could be the reason which forced him to cross his bottomline and take such an action which was thought to be unimaginable for him.

For a while, the five people considered the guess that Battle God's faction of three had been defeated and that the three continents behind them had also lost. Moreover, they lad lost so thoroughly that they had no chance of making a comeback.

"It's not like that. Everyone thought that at first, but it was quickly investigated and found to be false. Battle God's faction hadn't lost the war, but..."

The black clothed informant slightly hesitated and paused.

"Continue. Since it is a matter related to the people standing at the top of Earth's power pyramid, I will allow you to speak your mind even if you're just grasping for straws."

After learning that Battle God hadn't been defeated and the Central Continent hadn't lost, Blade Overlord's group breathed a sigh of relief.

Whatever happened to Battle God or the Central Continent had no relation to the five of them, but given that it involved the safety of their master's parents, they had no option but to treat the matter with the great importance.

"Some unverified information has been circulating among the top powerhouses. According to rumor, there was a sudden burst of sinister energy from Black Dragon Island the day before. Because of it, all the six continents decided to quickly make peace."

The black-clothed man quickly delivered all the information collected by the domain walkers.

After Blade Overlord and the other four heard it, they were left speechless for a long time.

They couldn't imagine how terrifying the energy which erupted from Black Dragon Island had to be to force the six monsters on Earth to reach a compromise without any disputes in a single day.

"Alright, you go now and tell the leader of domain walkers to spare some effort and pay attention to Barbarian Niu's whereabouts… In addition, keep your eyes on the situation of master's relatives in Vega City. If there are any changes, immediately carry out emergency measures," Blade Overlord instructed before commanding the black-robed man to retreat.

In the last two and a half years, the five had strictly followed Li Yunmu's instructions and hadn't stepped out of Moro Mountain Tenebrous Hidden Domain.

But it wasn't like they had lost all eyes and ears in the outside world. Because of the great increase in their strength, the five of them had formed a small but powerful faction of their own.

It easily became one of the top three factions which shouldn't be provoked. Naturally, this was only in the Fifth Dimension, but there were still many benefits to leading a faction. One of them was 'domain walkers'. They were the members of the faction which had a base in all the steel castles of the Fifth Dimension. Moreover, their feelers had also secretly sneaked into the real world.

The domain walkers mainly constituted of people who belonged to the private powers of Blade Overlord, Nangong Gongzi, and other six halted fluxers. In the two years, the people under Li Qinghong, Demon, and Barbarian Niu had also been integrated into the underground organization controlled by Blade Overlord.

Their main task was to collect information about the real world and act as the eyes and ears of their leaders. Domain walkers had spread quickly throughout the Fifth Dimension because they were composed of people who came from the private powers of the eight halted fluxers and because the five followers of Li Yunmu had become formidable to the extent that they couldn't be neglected in the Fifth Dimension.

Blade Overlord and other four had been given the titles of domain masters by the people of the Fifth Dimension. It was based on the fact that the five of them occupied the entire Moro Mountain Tenebrous Hidden Domain.

But everyone clearly understood that they weren't supreme existences, but also had a master named Li Yunmu. But he had descended to the Origin World and whether he was able to return or not was something which no one could tell.

Some people completely ignored him, believing that no one from the last generation of descenders would return.

But some people still held some hope. Some powerhouses, organizations, and clans had already began to collect silk before it rained 1 . They took the initiative to establish good relations with the factions under those who had descended.

No one could guarantee that there would never come a day when the descenders would establish a passage between the two worlds and return to the Origin World. Even if the chances of it happening were one in ten thousand, it might still happen!

After the descenders had entered the Origin World and stayed there for a long time before returning to Earth, their future strength and potential would increase greatly. Those with a foresight could see this and were quick in making relations with them.

Thus, although Blade Overlord and his people had remained extremely low key, many powers and clans had still established temporary friendship with him.

As a matter of fact, even without Li Yunmu's influence, the five of them had already matured enough to become one of the overlords of the Fifth Dimension.

Because of that, Blade Overlord and the others had great influence and possessed concealed power. After the black-clothed man had withdrawn, the five of them instantly looked at each other with fright in their eyes.

What sort of existence could force the six behemoths to become so concerned?

They didn't know much about it, but one thing was certain—they didn't need to continue arguing over the matter of whether to go out to rescue their master's relatives or not.

Since the six powers had negotiated peace, their master's relatives in Vega City would remain safe and sound.

"Seems like we need to increase our strength quickly. Earth's situation is changing every day, and heavenly transformation is coming increasingly closer. We all must make preparations before master returns," Nangong Gongzi said.

With nothing else to discuss, the five of them quickly began to cultivate again, after making an appointment to meet up a month from then once more. Although Li Yunmu wasn't on Earth, they still had a vague connection with him because of being his followers. Even if they were separated by the energy barrier between the two worlds, their link wasn't completely severed off. Their soul imprint was still bound to Li Yunmu's heavenly world.

chapters.title: Chapter 421: His Followers' Development
chapters.body:
Chapter 421: His Followers' Development

Chapter 421: His Followers' Development

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Because the group's soul imprints were bound to Li Yunmu's heavenly world, the five of them could clearly sense that not only was their master still alive, his strength had increased rapidly during the years he was gone.

The sensation of him becoming more powerful every day was becoming increasingly more intense. But he wasn't alone in getting stronger. The presences of Li Qinghong and Demon seemed to have strengthened greatly as well.

"I can sense Elder Sister Qinghong's presence. She is progressing at lightning speed."

Flowing Cloud forced out a bitter smile.

The five of them had thought that their increase in strength during the couple years had been astonishing, but when compared to Li Qinghong who had descended to the Origin World, they were like ordinary trains compared to bullet trains. Even when compared to Demon they were a bit slower.

It had to be known that they had used the King's True Territory without any hold back, absorbing the divine blood there to improve their bloodlines.

"How much divine blood have we collected?" asked Blade Overlord, who was responsible of making decisions while Li Yunmu was away.

"Until now, we have collected two thousand seven hundred sixty-three drops," Underworld Hand answered.

"Still far from sufficient. This speed is a lot slower compared to our master at that time."

Blade Overlord shook his head in dissatisfaction while the other four forced out bitter smiles. They had realized the vast disparity between their strength compared to that of Li Yunmu, even if it was him from two and a half years ago. At that time, his speed of killing the monsters in the king's true territory was a lot faster compared to theirs, even after their strength had increased. From this, they could clearly see the vast difference between his strength and their own combined one.

But Blade Overlord and the others didn't know that Li Yunmu had used shadow hack system which didn't know fatigue or exhaustion.

In fact, any one of them now was comparable to Xiye Hanbei of back then; otherwise they wouldn't be considered overlords of the Fifth Dimension. It was just that they were mistaken about Li Yunmu's strength.

"We haven't fallen behind on capturing and nurturing ape gods. We have already gathered one thousand six hundred of them. But if we provide them with divine blood and have them awaken their ancestral bloodlines before they enter a contract with master by binding their souls, I won't feel at ease." Devil Monkey sighed deeply.

"We needn't act with haste. As long as we prepare enough divine blood, then once master returns, this problem will easily be resolved."

"Ohh, I feel that the day of heavenly transformation isn't too far. Beginning from tomorrow, we must increase our pace," Nangong Gongzi said while nodding. During the past two years, all of them had acted together to kill many monsters in the king's true territory and absorbed many drops of divine blood which greatly increased the potential of their bloodline.

Moreover, while killing king grade monsters all the time, they had also condensed the eight rainbow lights of their devil king armor. It could be said that they had surpassed Li Yunmu in this aspect. Unlike them, he hadn't condensed even a single rainbow light of his king crystal armor because of the lack of twelve rainbow light kings.

But if Li Yunmu knew about the situation of his five followers, he would've been extremely satisfied.

"That's right, since times are becoming increasingly more chaotic and dangerous, we cannot wait any longer. We must attack the twelve rainbow light kings. Master couldn't even condense one rainbow light because of the lack of twelve rainbow light flux crystals," Flowing Cloud said while grinding her teeth.

Twelve rainbow light kings were extremely formidable. Even the ordinary kings were extremely powerful, then what to speak of the twelve rainbow light ones who had evolved because of divine blood.

Due to that, despite the great increase in the five's strength, they hadn't yet launched an attack on the terrifying monsters.

But they couldn't wait anymore and had to brave the danger.

"Don't be anxious, even if the twelve rainbow light kings transformed by divine blood are extremely terrifying, none of us are allowed to die. Devil Monkey, how is that matter proceeding?" Blade Overlord was extremely calm.

"It is beginning to materialize. After that lord sensed the great increase in our strength, his attitude toward us changed greatly. As long as he consents with our demand and provides that forbidden weapon, our success against the twelve rainbow light kings will increase by 20%," Devil Monkey replied with delight.

Among the five of them, only Devil Monkey stepped out of the hidden domain. He was the most experienced in disguising himself, which was why he had gone out to establish relationships.

When everyone heard his good news, all of them were delighted. As long as that lord consented to deliver the forbidden weapon to them, they would have assurance of victory when dealing with the twelve rainbow light kings.

Naturally, everyone understood that the only reason behind the change in the lord's attitude toward the five of them was Li Yunmu.

As his followers, they were bound to his heavenly world. When the other party saw Devil Monkey's strength increase rapidly, they clearly understood that his master, Li Yunmu, was living quite well in the Origin World.

If Li Yunmu had died, his followers would have also perished with him. If he had been weakened or severely injured in the Origin World, Devil Monkey and the others would have also suffered the same.

But Devil Monkey hadn't weakened. On the contrary, his strength had increased greatly. The lord has thus changed his position and consented to provide them with the forbidden weapon because he had decided to gamble on Li Yunmu.

The five followers weren't idiots and clearly understood that fact. Blade Overlord and the others also didn't want to miss the opportunity of using the helping hand. After all, there was no reason that they shouldn't do so.

"We only need to wait for a bit more. I think that lord will make his decision soon. As long as we obtain that forbidden weapon, we can quickly kill the twelve rainbow light monsters who have been transformed by divine blood. As for what to do now, everyone should use the time to gather more divine blood as well as ape gods. This was master's main command before he descended."

"Yes"

The four others enthusiastically nodded.

...

Li Yunmu wasn't aware of the events happening on Earth, and a month passed while he was cultivating on the island. During it, his strength had advanced to the next level, reaching forty-seven oxen from forty.

After attaining that level of physical strength, he wasn't far from crossing one of the thresholds to become a great flux master.

chapters.title: Chapter 422: New Shadow Skill, Five Shadow Devils
chapters.body:
Chapter 422: New Shadow Skill, Five Shadow Devils

Chapter 422: New Shadow Skill, Five Shadow Devils

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Li Yunmu was on the fringe of crossing one of the thresholds and could be considered to be half a step into the great flux master realm.

But the number of flux points opened by him still remained at the original seventy-two.

It wasn't that he didn't want to open them as quickly as possible, but that after getting trapped on this island, he could only wait until the system upgraded before settling that problem.

But it was also good for him. In the past half a year, his strength had increased too quickly, to the extent that his cultivation had become slightly unstable. Thus, he used the rare opportunity when he didn't have anything to do to consolidate his cultivation base while practicing Meridian Nurturing Flux Point Technique.

Like that, the last month gradually passed with Li Yunmu consolidating his realm. Without him knowing, three months had went by.

At the dawn of the ninety-first day, the system didn't take even one second more to upgrade than it had stated. At dawn, Li Yunmu finally heard its familiar voice after a long time.

[Congratulations, host. The system has upgraded to the sixth level.The system's development path can be chosen from now on, so requesting host to choose the new ability…]

Three successive notifications rang out in the ears of Li Yunmu, who was really excited upon hearing them. He quickly entered his consciousness sea, but his first action wasn't to choose the new ability.

Instead, he asked the system, "System, what special conditions need to be fulfilled for evolution to the seventh level?"

[You lack the qualifications to learn that so the system cannot reveal it. But you may know that it has something to do with shadows.]

As expected, the system didn't reveal the special condition once again. Because of that, Li Yunmu could only fumble around and make speculations.

"Alright, then allow me to see what abilities can you gain at level six."

Li Yunmu wasn't disheartened. He immediately moved to the next topic and began to scan the available abilities.

Since the system had upgraded to the sixth level, it could be considered as comparatively high level. It had three abilities from which Li Yunmu could choose.

First, the system would provide a new shadow skill which would further increase the efficiency of shadow hack. That shadow skill was called Shadow Devil.

Li Yunmu looked through it a number of times before understanding that this ability was quite formidable.

If the shadows learned that shadow skill, they could absorb a certain amount of experience points from the monsters killed and use them to condense a shadow devil.

There were five kinds of shadow devils. First was based on vitality and formed by blood. It possessed vitality which was even more formidable than that of the ape gods. As long as the shadow devil wasn't killed in one shot, it wouldn't be defeated.

As long as it existed, the injuries received by the shadows would be absorbed by the shadow devil, which would leave the shadows free of any injury.

This first type of shadow devil was called blood shadow devil. Its main ability was to receive damage intended for the shadows, so its combat ability was extremely weak. In short, it was a shield of blood which couldn't damage the opponent.

It could increase the survival rate of shadows while hacking, but it wouldn't increase their efficiency . But even then, it could still be considered an extraordinary ability.

The second type of shadow devil was called shield shadow devil.

As the name implied, it was a shadow devil which would be used for defense and act as a meat shield. But it was different from blood shadow devil in that it didn't have a formidable vitality. However, its defenses were extremely terrifying because they were established with the shadows as basis.

The shield shadow devil had an extra layer of shield. Its power was similar to that o Admiralty Cover and would reduce the damage by roughly 20%, but shadows couldn't transfer the incoming damage to it. In other words, it could only act as a meat shield in front of shadows to attract the attention. However, when Li Yunmu read it, his eyes immediately began to shine.

As a matter of fact, the shield shadow devil wasn't very formidable. For someone with weak defenses, then even if the damage was reduced by 20%, it still wouldn't be of much help to them.

However for Li Yunmu who possessed extremely high defense, the addition of another 20% was even more important.

Li Yunmu quickly made calculation about what would happen if a shadow condensed this type of shadow devil and its shield would reduce the incoming damage by 20%.

However, after that the remaining damage would again be reduced 30% by Safeguard, which would be followed by Admiralty Cover which would reduce the rest of the damage by 60%. After that, the leftover damage would have to pass through king crystal armor, devil dragon bone armor, great sun thunder tyrant body muscle marrow secrets and so on.

The more Li Yunmu thought about it, the more he saw that this sort of shadow devil was extremely suitable for him as well as the shadows which he condensed.

If the enemy's offense was a thousand attack points, the shield shadow devil would absorb 20%, which meant that only eight hundred attack points would remain. Then they would again be reduced by 30% by Safeguard which would leave five hundred and sixty attack points. These five hundred and sixty attack points would then be reduced by Admiralty Cover by 60%, which would mean that only the pitiful amount of two hundred and twenty four attacks points would reach Li Yunmu.

What did this mean?

No one could understand it more clearly than Li Yunmu. After three layers of damage reduction, he could probably even resist the attack of a mid stage great flux master.

But the shield shadow devil wasn't without its demerits. Its main defect was that it couldn't absorb the injuries of the host or die in his place like the blood shadow devil.

It could only be used to block attacks, and Li Yunmu was extremely unwilling to accept this fact. Without the flaw, it would have been close to his dream shadow devil.

The third shadow devil was called combat shadow devil. As the name implied, it efficiently assisted the shadows in combat to kill monsters.

It possessed defense and vitality identical to shadows, but its offense was 20% more formidable. In other words, if a combat shadow devil was created, it would be more formidable than a normal shadow. But it also had its defects—it couldn't die in place of its host and could only be used for killing.

chapters.title: Chapter 423: Shadow Devil King
chapters.body:
Chapter 423: Shadow Devil King

Chapter 423: Shadow Devil King

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

The fourth shadow devil was called dark shadow devil.

Shadows were in general good at concealing themselves in dark areas, but dark shadow devil was even better. It could only be used for assassination and ambush attacks. Dark shadow devil possessed the same strength as the shadows, but it had one ability which the shadows didn't—Stab Burst.

As long as the dark shadow devil got close to its target while being concealed, it would self-destruct and deal huge damage.

Li Yunmu looked read its details again and made an astonishing discovery. The instantaneous damage from the dark shadow devil was one and a half time greater than an all out attack from one of the shadows.

Although the damage was only increased by half, this small increase would be terrifying when taken into consideration that the shadows possessed impressive strength.

It could not be forgotten that the self-destruction would deal the one and a half time greater damage in an instant.

In other words, if Li Yunmu dispatched the dark shadow devil, even a flux expert in the great circle wouldn't be able to dodge its Stab Burst and would die.
